metadata.description: Official GitGuardian plugin marketplace for AI coding agents — secret scanning, honeytoken creation, and incident triage.

plugins.name: gitguardian
plugins.description: The official GitGuardian plugin for AI coding agents. Detects 700+ hardcoded secret types across files, git history, Docker images, and PyPI packages via the ggshield CLI; plants AWS honeytoken tripwires for the leaks scanning can't catch; and surfaces live incidents in your editor via the bundled GitGuardian Developer MCP server.
